name: Incident Center
description: Coordinate production incidents, responders, timelines, and postmortem actions.
backend_requirements: Incident model with severity, service_name, status, commander, opened_at, resolved_at, impact_summary, and customer_updates
Timeline event model for acknowledgements, mitigations, escalations, and recoveries
GET /api/incidents with severity, status, service, and commander filters plus search and pagination
POST /api/incidents, PUT /api/incidents/:id, and POST /api/incidents/:id/timeline for active response updates
GET /api/public/stats for open incident counts and MTTR style summary metrics
GET /api/incidents/:id/postmortem-preview to assemble a draft incident summary
frontend_requirements: Operations landing page with severity totals and active incident cards
Browse table with severity filters, service search, and SLA badges
Incident detail page with timeline entries and customer update feed
Responder dashboard with assigned incidents and overdue follow-ups
Admin view for incident audits and postmortem completion tracking
admin_requirements: Audit trail for reopened incidents and overdue postmortems
Admin metrics for average mitigation time and unresolved Sev1 incidents
